MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner / moving party Margaret Patrick
No other appearances

RULING:
No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted: Petitioner MARGARET PATRICK's Peition Of Margaret Patrick To Perpetuate Testimony Of Roger Patrick By Videotaped Deposition is granted. No opposition filed. The deposition may be held in Semmes, Alabama and shall commence no earlier than March 1, 2010. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported.
